title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker roles available in Leeds supporting adults with learning disabilities and complex needs.

- Assist with daily living tasks
- Support independence

Requirements:
- Previous care experience
- Right to work in the UK

Benefits:
- Flexible shifts
- Weekly pay

title: Care Assistant
description:
